name: Dr. Mikhail Caustic
description:
Alexander Maxwell Nox, also referred to by his alias Doctor Mikhail Caustic is an infamous scientist on the Apex games. 

His cold mannerism and ruthless ways of victory certainly make him stand out from the other legends, and the lack of information of his very own being makes him a rather intrieguing and secretive person overall.

Though, there's always that little 'something' in people, right?
creator: BurnTortilla
